name: Typeform
tagline: Beautiful online forms and surveys that engage users
description: Interactive form builder with conversational UX and rich logic
pros: Conversational one-question-at-a-time interface boosting completion rates 30%+
Rich logic jumps and calculations for dynamic forms
AI question generator producing complete forms from prompts
Video, photo, and GIF question types for engaging surveys
cons: Free tier limited to 10 responses/month severely restricts evaluation
100+ field logic limit broken across forms for complex workflows
Export options limited vs dedicated survey tools like SurveyMonkey

content.title: Executive Summary
content.body: Interactive form builder with conversational UX and rich logic Typeform earns a 4.4/5 rating from 14,200 user reviews.

content.title: TL;DR
content.body: Typeform is a leading productivity platform rated 4.4/5 across 14,200 reviews. Pricing starts at Free–$83/mo. Best for Marketers and Product Teams.

content.title: Rating Overview
content.body: Typeform scores 4.4/5 overall with ease of use (4.5/5), features (4.2/5), performance (4.3/5), support (3.9/5), value (4.2/5).

content.title: Quick Verdict
content.body: Typeform earns a 4.4/5 rating recommended for Marketers and Product Teams. Delivers strong feature depth with intuitive interface.

content.title: Company Background
content.body: Typeform was founded in 2012 in Barcelona, Spain, serving 3M+ users customers with 300+ employees.

content.title: Product Overview
content.body: Typeform is a beautiful online forms and surveys that engage users. Provides 18 features across Core, AI, Advanced, Integrations, Analytics categories. Mobile on iOS and Android. API available.

content.title: Key Features
content.body: Essential productivity features:

content.title: Feature Deep Dive
content.body: Form Builder. Drag-and-drop question editor. Logic Jumps. Conditional question paths. Calculations. Behind-the-scenes field math.

content.title: AI Features
content.body: Typeform AI includes AI question generator, Smart skip logic, AI scoring.

content.title: API & Automation
content.body: Typeform provides a comprehensive API for custom integration and workflow automation.

content.title: Security
content.body: Typeform holds SOC 2 Type II, GDPR, CCPA certifications with TLS 1.2+ and AES-256 encryption.

content.title: Compliance
content.body: Typeform complies with GDPR, CCPA, SOC 2 regulations.

content.title: Integrations
content.body: Integrates with Google Sheets, Slack, Mailchimp, HubSpot, Salesforce, Zapier, Airtable, Notion, and 2+ more.

content.title: Pricing
content.body: Typeform uses freemium with response-based tiers. Free tier available. Plans from Free–$83/mo.

content.title: Pros
content.body: Typeform advantages:
items: Conversational one-question-at-a-time interface boosting completion rates 30%+
Rich logic jumps and calculations for dynamic forms
AI question generator producing complete forms from prompts

content.title: Cons
content.body: Considerations:
items: Free tier limited to 10 responses/month severely restricts evaluation
100+ field logic limit broken across forms for complex workflows
Export options limited vs dedicated survey tools like SurveyMonkey

content.title: Performance
content.body: Strong performance with fast load times.

content.title: Ease of Use
content.body: Typeform has a low learning curve with intuitive interface.

content.title: User Experience
content.body: Streamlined modern interface.

content.title: Customer Support
content.body: Support rated 3.9/5 via email and knowledge base.

content.title: Industry Fit
content.body: Best for Forms and Productivity with Marketers and Product Teams teams.

content.title: Team Size Fit
content.body: Typeform accommodates teams of all sizes with generous free tier. Best ROI for 5-50 person teams.

content.title: Real Use Cases
content.body: A marketers team uses Typeform to streamline productivity workflows and improve team productivity.

content.title: Competitor Analysis
content.body: Typeform competes with other platforms. Primary differentiators: core functionality and ease of use.

content.title: Alternatives
content.body: Consider alternatives based on specific team requirements.

content.title: Migration Guide
content.body: Migration rated low complexity. Most teams transition within 1-2 weeks. Parallel testing recommended.

content.title: Buying Advice
content.body: Evaluate: feature alignment, total cost at Free–$83/mo, migration effort (1-2 weeks), and real-data trial.

content.title: Final Verdict
content.body: Typeform earns 4.4/5. Strong choice for Marketers and Product Teams. Recommended for teams prioritizing productivity.

author: StackPilot Team
learningCurve: Minimal — most users can get started within an hour
whoShouldUse: Typeform is perfect for freelancers and independent professionals who need an affordable, easy-to-use productivity tool. Its simplicity and core feature set make it ideal for solo practitioners.
whoShouldNotUse: Typeform may not be suitable for large enterprises with complex compliance requirements or teams needing extensive customization options. Organizations with more than 500 users may find the pricing less competitive at scale.
